headline: Norton Reveals the Top 10 Scams Standing Between You and a Scam Free Summer
summary: SPF isn't the only protection you need this summer. Norton, a global leader in consumer Cyber Safety and part of Gen (NASDAQ: GEN), today launched Scam Free Summer to help people spot and stop the scams that spike in in the summer months. The forecast shines light on the moments scammers tend to show up most.
